question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/controller/ContractController.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: constructServiceParameters()] Can an unprivileged external user send a data field with an odd number of hex characters that passes the @Hex validator but causes hexToBytes() to throw an exception outside the try/catch block in constructServiceParameters(), resulting in an unhandled error that leaves throttle tokens consumed and gradually starves the throttle?
